about.title: About
about.p1: Zorya Tech Studio is an independent mobile development studio. We build apps that combine thoughtful design with solid engineering.
about.p2: Our goal is to create useful everyday tools with attention to detail and user experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: What we're working on
projects.empty: Projects are in development. Stay tuned!

senso.name: Senso
senso.subtitle: Smart sensors in your pocket
senso.desc_short: An Android measurement toolkit: level, lux meter, decibel meter, compass. All calculations run on-device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the Senso app — a measurement toolkit for Android. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All measurements, settings, and calibrations are stored exclusively on your device (SharedPreferences for settings, SQLite for measurement history). No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Senso uses device sensors strictly for in-app, real-time calculations. All raw data stays in memory and is not transmitted anywhere:
privacy.permissions_mic: Microphone — used by the Decibel Meter to measure sound level. Audio is analysed frame-by-frame (RMS, A-weighting) and never recorded.
privacy.permissions_camera: Camera — used by the Camera Level mode (horizon overlay) and by the Camera fallback mode in the Lux Meter (frame brightness estimation). Frames are not stored or transmitted.
privacy.permissions_location: Location — used to compute magnetic declination (True North) in the Compass via the WMM-2025 model. Coordinates are used once for the math and not transmitted anywhere.
privacy.third_text: Senso displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the Settings and History screens, and a full-screen interstitial between tools). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Senso is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

alias.name: Alias
alias.subtitle: Party word game for friends
alias.desc_short: A pass-and-play party word game with 35+ categories and 14 languages. Explain words to your team without using them — beat the clock.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the Alias app — a pass-and-play party word game for Android. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All game settings, custom word lists, and team names are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. No game data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Alias requests only the minimum permissions required to display ads. The app does not access the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data.
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to load ads from Google AdMob. The app itself works fully offline; only ad loading uses the network.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or opt out of this identifier at any time in your device's Google settings.
privacy.third_text: Alias displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the home screen and a full-screen interstitial between rounds). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Alias is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

offer.title: Terms of Use
offer.intro: This document is a public offer by Zorya Tech Studio ("Studio", "we") regarding the use of the Alias mobile app (the "App"). By downloading, installing, or using the App, you (the "User") unconditionally accept all terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree to any of the terms, please do not use the App.
offer.definitions_text: App — the Alias mobile application for Android, distributed via Google Play. Parties — the Studio and the User. Agreement — these Terms of Use together with the Privacy Policy.
offer.subject_text: The Studio grants the User the right to use the App free of charge for personal, non-commercial purposes subject to this Agreement. The App is distributed on a freemium model: the base functionality is free and ad-supported, while additional features may be available via one-time in-app purchases through Google Play.
offer.acceptance_text: Acceptance of this offer occurs through any of the following actions: downloading the App from Google Play, installing it on a device, or actually using it. From the moment of acceptance, this Agreement is deemed concluded between the Studio and the User.
offer.license_text: The Studio grants the User a non-exclusive, royalty-free, revocable, non-transferable license to install and use the App on Android devices owned or lawfully controlled by the User. The license remains in force for as long as the User uses the App and is limited to personal, non-commercial use.
offer.restrictions_reverse: decompile, disassemble, or reverse-engineer the App, except as expressly permitted by applicable law;
offer.restrictions_modify: modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works based on the App;
offer.restrictions_distribute: copy, distribute, sell, rent, sublicense, or otherwise commercially exploit the App or any part of it;
offer.restrictions_circumvent: circumvent or attempt to circumvent any technical protection measures, ad-display mechanisms, or in-app purchase systems.
offer.ads_text: The App contains ads served by Google AdMob (banners and full-screen interstitials between rounds). Ads fund the free version of the App. By using the App, the User consents to the display of ads. Data collection by the ad network is governed by Google's policy and is described in our Privacy Policy.
offer.iap_text: The App may offer one-time in-app purchases (e.g., a premium unlock that removes ads) via the Google Play billing system. All purchases are processed by Google; the Studio does not receive payment card data. Refunds are handled in accordance with Google Play's policy. As of this version of the Agreement, in-app purchases may be inactive — activation will be announced in an App update.
offer.ugc_text: The App allows the User to create custom word lists and team names. Such content is stored exclusively on the User's device and is not transmitted to the Studio. The User is solely responsible for the content they create and agrees not to use offensive, unlawful, or rights-infringing material.
offer.ip_text: All exclusive proprietary rights to the App, including its code, design, graphics, audio, text, and other components, belong to the Studio. This Agreement does not transfer any intellectual property rights in the App to the User, other than the limited license to use expressly granted herein.
offer.warranty_text: The App is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including warranties of fitness for a particular purpose, error-free operation, or uninterrupted availability. The Studio does not warrant that the App will meet all User expectations or operate without faults on every device.
offer.liability_text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Studio is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of the use or inability to use the App, loss of data stored locally on the User's device, or actions of third-party services (Google Play, AdMob). The Studio's total liability, if any, shall not exceed the amount actually paid by the User for in-app purchases during the previous 12 months.
offer.privacy_text: The handling of information when using the App is governed by a separate document — the Privacy Policy — which forms an integral part of this Agreement.
offer.termination_text: The User may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from their device. The Studio reserves the right to discontinue the App or any of its features upon notice via a Google Play update or on the Studio's website. Termination does not relieve either Party from obligations that arose prior to such termination.
offer.changes_text: The Studio reserves the right to unilaterally modify the terms of this Agreement. The current version is always posted on this page with the effective date. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes the User's acceptance of the new version.
offer.law_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of Ukraine. Any disputes arising in connection with this Agreement shall first be resolved through negotiations between the Parties; failing that, in court in accordance with the laws of Ukraine.
offer.contact_text: Questions about the terms of this Agreement can be sent to:

ytaudit.name: YouTube Audit
ytaudit.subtitle: Math-based YouTube channel audit
ytaudit.desc_short: Audit public YouTube channels via the official API: 70+ metrics and 50+ recommendations. No sign-in, all data stays on your device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the YouTube Audit app — a tool for math-based audits of public YouTube channels. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in with Google/YouTube. We do not request or store your name, email, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All audit results, history, settings, and daily-limit counters are stored exclusively on your device (SharedPreferences for settings, Hive for audit history). No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: YouTube Audit requests only the minimum permissions required. The app does not use the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data:
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to call the YouTube Data API v3 (fetching public channel metadata, playlists, and video statistics) and to load Google AdMob ads.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or opt out of this identifier at any time in your device's Google settings.
privacy.youtube_text: The app uses the YouTube Data API v3 with a server API key to fetch only public information about the channel you provide (URL or @handle): channel metadata, video list, view counts, and comment stats. YouTube Audit does NOT use OAuth and has no access to private data, private videos, analytics, or any information tied to your Google account. Use of YouTube data is governed by the YouTube Terms of Service and the Google Privacy Policy.
privacy.third_text: YouTube Audit displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on main screens, a full-screen interstitial between audits, and rewarded ads for extra audits) and queries public data via the YouTube Data API. These services may collect data per their own policies:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.third_youtube: provides public channel data via the YouTube Data API v3. Requests are processed under the YouTube Terms of Service and the Google Privacy Policy.
privacy.children_text: YouTube Audit is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

sudokulens.name: SudokuLens
sudokulens.subtitle: Smart Sudoku Solver
sudokulens.desc_short: Solve any Sudoku instantly by scanning it with your camera or entering it manually. Supports 4×4 to 16×16 grids, step-by-step solving with techniques, a puzzle generator, 8 themes, and 8 languages.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the SudokuLens app. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app does not require registration, account creation, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: Your puzzle history and settings are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. No data is transmitted to our servers. We do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: To recognize Sudoku puzzles, the app can use your device camera or images you choose from your photo library. Image recognition runs entirely on your device (Google ML Kit, offline). Photos and camera frames are processed locally and are never uploaded to our servers or shared with third parties.
privacy.third_text: Our app uses the following third-party services that may collect certain information in accordance with their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads (banner, interstitial, and rewarded). May collect device identifiers and data for ad serving.
privacy.children_text: This app is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our mobile applications.
privacy.collect_text: Our apps do not require registration and do not collect personal information directly. However, our apps use third-party services that may automatically collect certain data:
privacy.collect_firebase_text: Collects anonymous usage data such as app opens, screen views, session duration, device model, OS version, country, and language. This data is used to understand how users interact with our apps and to improve functionality. No personally identifiable information is collected.
privacy.collect_admob_text: Displays ads within our apps. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve personalized or non-personalized ads. You can opt out of personalized ads in your device settings.
privacy.use_text: We use analytics data solely to improve app quality, fix bugs, and understand general usage patterns. We do not sell, trade, or transfer your data to outside parties.
privacy.third_text: Our apps use the following third-party services that have their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_firebase: Firebase Analytics — Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
privacy.security_text: We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
